steps.title: Identify the study's finding
steps.content: A finding is the result or key outcome of a study, not its setup or background. In the notes, that's the 65.3% statistic — the key result showing which logo version participants selected.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: Choice A presents the core result (65.3% selected unaltered) while providing just enough context about the task to make it meaningful. The other choices focus on setup, methodology, or background details without presenting the actual outcome. That matches choice A — A is correct.
